reviews.comment: Nathan Phillips is a straight-up G. Yeah, there is a lot of homework and tests, but you get that with any (math) class at Berea. Phillips at least tries to make it as fun and tolerable as possible. He is really chill, easy to talk to, will help if you are struggling, and is very accommodating. He is a 5 Star, Grade A bro. 10/10 would recommend.
